portfolio_rationale: LLY leads with exceptional revenue growth (37.6%), best-in-class margins, and improving technical momentum, making it the highest-conviction pick. GOOGL has the strongest technical momentum but extreme overbought conditions (RSI 90.5) warrant a reduced position. AAPL and XOM offer solid fundamentals with positive technicals, while AMZN is excluded due to clearly bearish technical signals (price below 20-day MA, negative 5-day and 20-day returns) and BRK.B is minimized due to negative revenue growth.

LLY.reason: Best fundamental growth story (37.6% revenue growth, 84% gross margin) combined with positive technical momentum and MACD above signal line, despite elevated leverage.

GOOGL.reason: Strong fundamentals and the best technical momentum in the universe, but RSI at 90.5 and 18.8% 20-day return signal extreme overbought conditions warranting a reduced position.

AAPL.reason: Solid all-around fundamentals with healthy margins and cash flow, price above both 20-day and 50-day MAs, though MACD weakening and sub-1.0 current ratio are minor concerns.

XOM.reason: Positive 5-day and 20-day price momentum, supportive news sentiment, and solid cash flows, though missing key fundamental metrics and litigious news language add uncertainty.

BRK.B.reason: Decent operating margins and cash flow with positive 20-day momentum, but negative revenue growth YoY and low trading volume reduce conviction relative to peers.

AMZN.reason: Excluded due to clearly bearish technical picture with price below 20-day MA and negative momentum on both 5-day and 20-day timeframes, undermining the otherwise strong fundamental case.
